title: Volumes, PersistentVolumes, Claims, StorageClasses, CSI, Snapshots, and Recovery · API and Operations Recall
summary: An on-call handoff reconstructs volumes, persistentvolumes, claims, storageclasses, csi, snapshots, and recovery from delayed object status, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the stateful storage and recovery contract under changed capacity. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for stateful storage and recovery contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish image, writable layer, emptyDir, projected, hostPath, ephemeral CSI, persistent, and external application storage lifecycles and authority.
Trace PV and PVC capacity, access modes, volume mode, selectors, binding, claim references, node affinity, phases, expansion, and release.
Design StorageClasses with provisioner, parameters, defaulting, reclaim policy, expansion, mount options, and WaitForFirstConsumer topology behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review K8s Volume Lifecycle Types
steps.instruction:
Order the K8s Volume Lifecycle Types orchestration evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review K8s Volume Lifecycle Types.
steps.why: Correct order keeps K8s Volume Lifecycle Types assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review K8s Volume Lifecycle Types, keep K8s Volume Lifecycle Types connected to mechanically reviewable Kubernetes object, status, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A review StatefulSet loses a node while its PVC is bound in another zone, reclaim policy is Delete, expansion is pending, and the backup has never restored. Defend StorageClass, binding, access mode, topology, snapshot, restore, and application consistency. Competency probe: Distinguish image, writable layer, emptyDir, projected, hostPath, ephemeral CSI, persistent, and external application storage lifecycles and authority.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so K8s Volume Lifecycle Types has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: For Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review K8s Volume Lifecycle Types, name the context, namespace, API identity, desired state, observed status, controller, policy, and failure-domain boundary, K8s Volume Lifecycle Types precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review K8s Volume Lifecycle Types, trace this concrete input and predict admission, defaulting, scheduling, reconciliation, status, traffic, storage, policy, disruption, and cleanup evidence before reviewing it: A review StatefulSet loses a node while its PVC is bound in another zone, reclaim policy is Delete, expansion is pending, and the backup has never restored. Defend StorageClass, binding, access mode, topology, snapshot, restore, and application consistency. Competency probe: Distinguish image, writable layer, emptyDir, projected, hostPath, ephemeral CSI, persistent, and external application storage lifecycles and authority.

For Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review K8s Volume Lifecycle Types, challenge the documented misconception with object, condition, event, policy, failure, repair, rollback, and transfer evidence: Every volume outlives its Pod and can be mounted from any replacement node.

options.text: Capture client and server versions, context, namespace, API discovery, current object state, ownership, and immutable release identity for the review K8s Volume Lifecycle Types case
